headline: Is It Time To Reconsider Dollar Tree (DLTR) After This Year’s 20% Share Price Slide
summary: If you are wondering whether Dollar Tree is still priced attractively after everything that has happened with the stock, this article focuses squarely on what the current share price might be implying about value. At a last close of US$101.97, the stock has returned 0.6% over the past 7 days, while the 1 year return sits at 22.2% and the year to date move is a 20.1% decline, with longer 3 and 5 year returns also in negative territory. These mixed returns come against a backdrop of ongoing...
